scripts.build: node -e "try { require('fs').unlinkSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'); } catch (_) {}" && env -u TURBOPACK NODE_ENV=production next build
scripts.test: node --import tsx/esm --test tests/engine.test.ts tests/statistics.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts tests/share-data.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run typecheck
